query_intent: Compare item-level cumulative daily sales between web and store channels over month sequence 1216-1227, returning dates where web cumulative sales exceed store cumulative sales.

dag_nodes.intent: Compute cumulative web sales per item by date within the 12-month sequence using windowed running sums.
Compute cumulative store sales per item by date within the same sequence using windowed running sums.
Full-outer-join web and store daily cumulative series by item/date, carry forward cumulative maxima, and keep rows where web cumulative exceeds store cumulative.
